summary: GJC Platform Phase P0 Backend Testing Complete. All 20 API tests passed (100%). AI-powered candidate-job matching using OpenAI embeddings + pgvector is fully functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/v1/gjc/health - Returns healthy status for postgres, mongodb, and ai_matching
POST /api/v1/gjc/company/jobs - Creates job and generates embedding
GET /api/v1/gjc/company/jobs/{id}/candidates - Returns semantically matched candidates with scores
GET /api/v1/gjc/matching/score - Returns correct score between job and candidate
POST /api/v1/gjc/agency/apply - Creates placement with match score
GET /api/v1/gjc/candidate/status/{id} - Returns applications with status messages
GET /api/v1/gjc/admin/dashboard - Shows correct overview and pipeline stats
Seed data verification - Company and Agency exist in PostgreSQL
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns (routes, services, database)
Pydantic models properly validate input data
AI matching service correctly uses OpenAI text-embedding-3-small with 1536 dimensions
pgvector cosine distance used for semantic similarity search
Status transitions properly validated with audit logging
Foreign key constraints properly enforced (admin_user_id must exist in users table)
All API responses exclude MongoDB _id field
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: TechRo Solutions SRL (company), Recruit Asia (agency), admin@gjc.ro (admin user)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GJC Platform Phase P0 is complete. All 4 core backend modules (Company, Agency, Candidate, Admin) are working. AI matching with pgvector produces sensible match scores (50-80% range). PostgreSQL tables: users, companies, agencies, candidates, jobs, placements, visa_processes, relocation_tickets, status_audit_log. MongoDB used for profile data. OpenAI API key configured for embeddings.
